canonical.text: Bug: analyze(s) in src/index.js reports the wrong maxDepth (maximum bracket nesting depth) for nested input — it overstates the depth. For '[]' maxDepth should be 1, for '[[]]' it should be 2, and for '[][]' it should be 1. Balanced detection is correct and must stay correct. Explore the codebase, find the cause, and fix it so maxDepth is correct for any input without breaking existing tests. Run node --test until all tests pass.
